listings.title: Sony 24-70mm f/2.8 GM II Like New
listings.body: For sale is a Sony FE 24-70mm f/2.8 GM II lens in like-new condition. This professional-grade G Master lens delivers outstanding image quality, fast and accurate autofocus, and exceptional sharpness throughout the entire zoom range. Perfect for portraits, weddings, events, landscapes, and everyday photography. Features: Constant f/2.8 aperture throughout the zoom range Ultra-sharp G Master optics Fast, quiet, and precise autofocus Lightweight and compact design Excellent condition with no scratches, dents, or optical issues Fully tested and working perfectly Included: Front and rear lens caps Lens hood Original packaging (if applicable) Shipping & Delivery Available The lens is securely packaged and ready for shipping or local delivery. Buy with confidence—serious inquiries only. Feel free to contact me if you have any questions or would like additional photos.

listings.title: Nord Grand Keyboard – Premium Hammer Action Piano
listings.body: Nord Grand Digital Piano – Excellent Condition Selling my Nord Grand, an 88-key digital piano with Kawai hammer-action keys for a true grand piano feel. Offers premium Nord sounds, intuitive controls, and pro-level effects—perfect for stage or studio. Never gigged. Includes power cable, soft case and original box. Let me know if you have any questions! Not interested in trades!

listings.title: Pressure Washer (Like New)
listings.body: Generac 3100 PSI Pressure Washer – Like New (Used Only 3x) Description: Selling a powerful Generac gas pressure washer in excellent, like-new condition. It has literally only been used 3 times for light home cleaning and has been stored indoors. Specs: 3100 PSI / 2.4 GPM / 196cc engine. Price: $250 cash or Venmo Location: Pick up in Armonk.
